name: iclic-inc/chunked-audio-upload
description: Resumable multipart upload for large episode audio files using direct browser-to-S3 chunk uploads.

max_file_size_mb.label: Maximum audio file size (MB)
max_file_size_mb.hint: Upper bound accepted by the chunked upload API.

chunked_threshold_mb.label: Chunked upload threshold (MB)
chunked_threshold_mb.hint: Files above this size use multipart upload automatically.

chunk_size_mb.label: Part size (MB)
chunk_size_mb.hint: Each multipart chunk size. S3 requires at least 5 MB (except last chunk).

presigned_url_ttl_seconds.label: Presigned URL TTL (seconds)
presigned_url_ttl_seconds.hint: Validity duration for signed upload-part URLs.

temp_key_prefix.label: Temporary object key prefix
temp_key_prefix.hint: S3 prefix used for temporary multipart objects before episode save.
